narrative:
Brecksville-00-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,206 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.6%, a modest Republican lean of 2.7 percentage points.
